sizing_rule.note: Reallocate active equity allocation upward when equity grows, downward when equity declines. Based on 80% inactive equity reserve and quarterly withdrawal rate of 2.207%. Formula derives ~10-period reallocation cycle. Increase position size after equity growth (anti-martingale logic), reduce during equity decline (drawdown-scaled logic). Specific scale multipliers not provided by author.

source_rule_text: Reallocate position size by increasing active equity allocation when equity grows and decreasing it when equity declines to achieve greatest geometric growth.
